message:
feat(Lib): Implement compression modules (gzip, bz2, lzma, zipfile, tarfile)

- gzip.zig: GzipFile with compress/decompress using std.compress.zlib
- bz2.zig: BZ2File, BZ2Compressor, BZ2Decompressor (placeholder, no native bz2)
- lzma.zig: LZMAFile, LZMACompressor, LZMADecompressor using std.compress.xz
- zipfile.zig: ZipFile, ZipInfo with deflate compression and central directory
- tarfile.zig: TarFile, TarInfo with USTAR format support
